headline: Will Dollar Tree's (DLTR) Profit Rebound and Cautious 2026 Outlook Recast Its Investment Narrative?
summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. reported its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results on March 16, 2026, with quarterly sales rising to US$5,446.1 million from US$4,996.7 million and net income improving to US$506.1 million from a very large net loss a year earlier, while full-year sales grew to US$19.40 billion and net income to US$1.28 billion. Alongside this swing back to profitability, management issued more cautious fiscal 2026 guidance and outlined plans for roughly 400 new store openings,...

Alongside this swing back to profitability, management issued more cautious fiscal 2026 guidance and outlined plans for roughly 400 new store openings,...

headline: Oil Relief Opens the Door for AI to Take Back the Tape
summary: Monday’s rebound on Wall Street looked encouraging on the surface, but beneath it was still the same fragile market story: investors remain glued to every move in oil and the Strait of Hormuz, while eagerly rotating back into AI-linked names the moment energy pressure eases. Lower crude gave the market room to breathe, but not yet a reason to relax.
